title: Above
description: As a GPS hobbyist, you are interested in looking at how a database of altitude recordings will change to account for sea level rise. For your projections, you will assume that between now and $2050$, the sea level will rise by $30$ centimeters. Your input will be a single altitude entry from a database of geolocations (given in meters). You need to output what that altitude will be in $2050$, modified by your sea level rise projection.
input: A single real number $-100\,000 \leq N \leq 100\,000$, representing a single altitude entry. The number contains at most $4$ digits after the decimal point.
output: Print the predicted altitude in $2050$. Your output must be within $0.001$ of the correct answer to be accepted.
